facebook.caption:
916 reviews. 4.7 stars. On a noodle shop on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo.

Mì Tê - Artisan Noodles is not playing around. Locals keep coming back, tourists stumble in, and everyone leaves with a photo of the bowl. Phu Quoc has no shortage of food spots. This one earns its rating.

Find it at 126 Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, Khu phố 7. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch this bowl land on the table. Mì Tê - Artisan Noodles. 4.7 stars across 916 reviews. The queue tells you everything you need to know before you even order.
